title: The Voluntary Surrender of Salaries (Exemption from Taxation) Act, 1961
full_text: The Voluntary Surrender of Salaries (Exemption from Taxation) Act, 1961 स्‍वेच्‍छया वेतन अभ्‍यर्पण (करों से छूट) अधिनियम, 1961 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196146 Act Number: 46 Enactment Date: 1961-12-06 Act Year: 1961 Short Title: The Voluntary Surrender of Salaries (Exemption from Taxation) Act, 1961 Hindi Title: स्‍वेच्‍छया वेतन अभ्‍यर्पण (करों से छूट) अधिनियम, 1961 Long Title: An Act to provide for exempting from taxes on income a portion of the salary or allowances payable to any person who has in the public interest volunteered to forego it. Ministry: Ministry of Finance Department: Department of Revenue Enforcement Date: 06-12-1981 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Voluntary Surrender of Salaries (Exemption from Taxation) Act, 1961 Show all section Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Exemption from taxes on income in respect of salaries surrendered in favour of Government. Section 3. Provisions of section 2 to apply to allowances. Section 4. Power to make rule. Section 5. Repeal.
